prose: Oxygen (O₂) frontier-orbital HOMO–LUMO gap computed via DFT using B3LYP functional with def2-TZVP basis set (tier standard) in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 3 (triplet ground state). The molecule was treated as a single-point calculation on the user-supplied geometry without re-optimization. SCF converged in 7 cycles. HOMO energy: −8.8740 eV; LUMO energy: −3.5859 eV; gap: 5.2881 eV. The frontier orbitals are degenerate (α and β spins both occupied at HOMO, both empty at LUMO), consistent with O₂'s ³Σ_g⁻ triplet-diradical ground state. This is a computed orbital-energy gap, not an experimental excitation energy or ionization potential. All integrity checks passed.
